mapper.select: SELECT c.center_id AS centerId, c.center_name AS centerName, c.center_region AS centerRegion, TO_CHAR(c.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS createdAt, c.center_content AS centerContent, c.space, c.facility, c.notice FROM centers c WHERE c.center_id = #{centerId}

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY r.created_at DESC) AS reviewId, r.user_account_id AS userAccountId, r.user_profile_image_url AS profileImageUrl, r.user_nickname AS nickname, r.user_handle AS handle, r.content, r.grade AS rating, TO_CHAR(r.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS createdAt, TO_CHAR(r.updated_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS updatedAt FROM vw_centers_reviews r WHERE r.center_id = #{centerId} ORDER BY r.created_at DESC
SELECT room_id AS roomId, center_id AS centerId, center_name AS centerName, sport_id AS sportId, category, base_fee AS baseFee FROM vw_rooms WHERE center_id = #{centerId} ORDER BY room_id ASC

SELECT TO_CHAR(measured_at, 'HH24') AS hourLabel, ROUND(AVG(temperature), 2) AS avgTemperature, ROUND(AVG(humidity), 2) AS avgHumidity, ROUND(AVG(light_on), 2) AS avgLightOn FROM room_env_reading WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND measured_at >= TO_DATE(#{targetDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND measured_at < TO_DATE(#{targetDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1 GROUP BY TO_CHAR(measured_at, 'HH24') ORDER BY hourLabel
mapper.update: UPDATE centers_reviews SET status = 'HIDDEN' WHERE review_id = #{reviewId}
mapper.select: SELECT cr.review_id AS reviewId, cr.center_id AS centerId, cr.account_id AS userAccountId, d.nickname AS nickname, d.handle AS handle, d.profile_image_url AS profileImageUrl, cr.grade AS rating, cr.content AS content, cr.status AS status, TO_CHAR(cr.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS createdAt, TO_CHAR(cr.updated_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS updatedAt FROM centers_reviews cr JOIN vw_account_display d ON cr.account_id = d.account_id WHERE cr.review_id = #{reviewId}
